1841120.name: RPG Maker MV - MT Tiny Tales Overworld Tiles
1841120.description:
Tiny Tales is designed for those who want to create a cute yet epic adventure scenario for their game. In Tiny Tales: Overworld, we cover the outdoors and town settings!

This pack Includes:

* An assortment of terrain autotiles and tilesets, properly formatted and ready for use!
* Various terrains and vegetation for different climates and moods - such as deserts, snowlands and the classic forest and hills!
* An assortment of charming house tiles, both exterior and interior, with a versatile set of basic decorations to make your interiors unique!

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
1841120.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 日语, 韩语, 繁体中文, 阿拉伯语, 简体中文
